nasb.text: The sons of Benjamin also lived from Geba onward, at Michmash and Aija, at Bethel and its towns,

esv.text: The people of Benjamin also lived from Geba onward, at Michmash, Aija, Bethel and its villages,

cnv.text: 有些便雅憫人住在迦巴、密抹、亞雅、伯特利和屬於伯特利的鄉村，

ccb.text: 便雅悯人住的地方由迦巴起直到密抹、亚雅、伯特利和伯特利周围的村庄，
